message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-rollout): pin RolloutControllerConfig defaults + RolloutDecision wire format + RolloutObservation builder (resolves flywheel_connectors-068cr)

14 tests pinning the staged-deploy decision contract every release-
engineering dashboard and rollout-audit consumer depends on. Zero
prior conformance coverage.

- RolloutControllerConfig 4 documented defaults: 60s soak before
  auto-promotion, allow_unsupported_self_check_promotion=true,
  crash_loop_threshold=3, crash_loop_window_secs=300 (5min)
- RolloutDecision 4 snake_case variants (scheduled/hold/promote/
  rollback); serde wire form; rejects mixed-case/unknown
- RolloutDecision::as_str MUST match serde wire form (logs ↔ JSON
  parity — both consumers see the same string)
- RolloutDecision Copy + 4-variant distinctness
- RolloutObservation::new initialises documented defaults (latency=
  None, uptime=0, pinned=false, crashed=false, observed_at=now)
- with_latency_ms / with_uptime_secs builder chain preserves all
  other fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
